summary: Frontend-only E2E testing of the NEW PATITAS pet e-commerce mode (separate cart from AURUM). All 11 review-request features verified working at 100%. Tests included: landing CTA 'Ir a la tienda' (home-tienda-cta) navigates to /servicios/tienda; header shows Tienda nav, pet-cart-link with badge, and Agendar cita; tienda renders 8 product cards with working category filters (all/alimento/juguetes/higiene/accesorios) and search input (filtering by name/description); hover quick-add (+) button on product card adds to pet cart and increments header badge; pet product detail (/servicios/producto/:slug) shows specs, qty selector, and both 'Agregar al carrito' and 'Comprar ahora' buttons; pet cart at /servicios/carrito lists items with qty +/- and remove and shows subtotal/shipping/total with 'Finalizar compra' navigating to checkout; pet checkout fills contact/shipping form, click 'Pagar' shows 'Procesando tu pago' then after ~2.8s shows 'Pago aprobado' with N° de orden; pet cart cleared in localStorage after success. CRITICAL cart independence verified BOTH ways: adding PATITAS items leaves aurum_cart_v1='[]' (and /ecommerce/carrito empty); adding AURUM items leaves patitas_cart_v1='[]' (and /servicios/carrito shows pet-cart-empty). Regression: PATITAS booking page at /servicios/agendar still loads; AURUM ecommerce home /ecommerce still loads correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: AppContext correctly uses separate localStorage keys (aurum_cart_v1 vs patitas_cart_v1) and exposes addToPetCart/updatePetQty/removeFromPetCart/clearPetCart with petCartTotal/petCartCount that are fully isolated from the AURUM cart state. Independence is enforced by data shape, not just by UI conventions — well done.
PetCheckout uses 2.8s setTimeout to simulate Mercado Pago and clearPetCart() runs BEFORE setStep('success'), so the success screen renders with petCart already empty — verified storage='[]'.
Route conflict-free: /servicios/producto/:slug and /ecommerce/producto/:slug are namespaced under different layout routes, no overlap.
Minor (carry-over from iter 1, not introduced here): Radix Dialog a11y warning and ve-dynamic hydration noise in admin still present but unrelated to pet store feature.
Nice: pet-cart-link badge updates reactively as items are added from anywhere (quick-add from card OR add-to-cart on detail page) — verified going from 1 -> 2 across page navigations.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@demo.com / admin123 (unchanged, not used this iteration)
seed_data_creation: None required - seedPetProducts (8 items pp-001..pp-008) and seedPetCategories (4 cats) hydrate from /src/data/seedData.js on first read.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pet store fully verified at https://patitas-services.preview.emergentagent.com/servicios/tienda. To test cart independence quickly: localStorage.removeItem both keys, add to either store, then check the OTHER cart route (/ecommerce/carrito or /servicios/carrito) is empty. Pet checkout success takes ~2.8s; wait for [data-testid='pet-checkout-success'] with timeout>=6000ms. Pet product slugs: alimento-premium-adulto, snacks-dentales, pelota-interactiva, cuerda-mordedora, shampoo-hipoalergenico, cepillo-quita-pelos, collar-ajustable, cama-ortopedica. Free shipping over CLP 30.000 otherwise 3.990.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. Implementation fully matches the review request — separate localStorage keys give true cart isolation between AURUM and PATITAS, both checkout simulators work, all data-testid hooks are present and consistent.
